levels.title: Find Sum #1
levels.description: Complete the function to return the sum of the list.

levels.title: Reverse String #2
levels.description: Use slicing to reverse the input string.

levels.title: Find Maximum #3
levels.description: Update the loop to check if the current num is greater than the max.

levels.title: Base Case #4
levels.description: Add the base case for n == 0 to return 1.

levels.title: Stack Pop #5
levels.description: Remove and return the last item from the stack.

levels.title: Queue Enqueue #6
levels.description: Add an item to the beginning of the list to simulate a queue.

levels.title: Check Key #7
levels.description: Check if the key exists in the dictionary before accessing.
levels.solution_code:
def get_val(d, k):
    if k in d: return d[k]

levels.title: Bubble Sort Swap #8
levels.description: Swap the two elements if the first is larger.
levels.starter_code:
if arr[j] < arr[j+1]:
    arr[j], arr[j+1] = arr[j+1], arr[j]
levels.solution_code:
if arr[j] > arr[j+1]:
    arr[j], arr[j+1] = arr[j+1], arr[j]
